title: nervilia hispida
intro: Nervilia hispida, also known as the hairy nervilia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Nervilia hispida include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
